description.content: Manage vehicle connections and user authorizations

Retrieves the current battery level and estimated range for an electric or hybrid vehicle. Requires the read_battery permission.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieves the current GPS coordinates of the vehicle. Requires the read_location permission.

Send commands to control vehicle functions
EV charging management and status
Retrieves the current charging status of an EV including plug-in state and charge progression. Requires the read_charge permission.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Starts or stops charging for an electric vehicle. Requires the control_charge permission.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieves the current charge limit setting for an EV.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Sets the maximum battery charge level (as a percentage) for an EV. Requires the control_charge permission.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Vehicle security, locking and unlocking
Retrieves the current lock/unlock status of the vehicle's doors, windows, storage, sunroof, and charge port. Requires the read_security permission.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Locks or unlocks the vehicle's doors remotely. Requires the control_security permission.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Vehicle navigation and destination setting
Sets a navigation destination for the vehicle. Requires the control_navigation permission.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Check vehicle compatibility with Smartcar

The Smartcar Vehicles API provides a standardized REST interface for accessing connected vehicle data and sending commands to vehicles across multiple OEMs through a single integration. Retrieve signals such as battery level, odometer, location, fuel, engine oil life, and lock status, or issue commands like lock/unlock doors, start/stop charging, set charge limits, and set navigation destinations. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 with user-granted permissions per vehicle.

Contact Support:
 Name: Smartcar Support
 Email: support@smartcar.com
